While making changes to our daily habits and lifestyle choices can certainly make a difference in lowering pollution rates, it’s crucial to acknowledge that combating pollution requires systematic change and policy implementation on both local and global scales. This includes prioritizing environmental protection in political decisions, promoting research and development of cleaner technologies, and implementing strict regulations and penalties for companies who fail to adhere to established environmental standards.
